category_sources: Official 1ML page describes 1ML as a reboot of ML with first-class modules and a prototype interpreter: https://people.mpi-sws.org/~rossberg/1ml/
source_facts.description says it is a reboot of ML unifying core and module layers.
display_name_sources: Official 1ML page title is 1ML - core and modules united.
Official GitHub repository is rossberg/1ml: https://github.com/rossberg/1ml
docs_sources: Official 1ML page says to see the README for basic documentation.
Official GitHub README documents building, running, and language syntax.
repo_sources: Official 1ML page links to the GitHub repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was researched.
tags_sources: Official 1ML page describes the language research and prototype interpreter.
